zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey De Tregoz於大約1215年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可比林福德時，他的父親Robert de Tregoz I48歲，母親Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham38歲。他至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1255年享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tregoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from Treago in Crantock (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + uncertain final element.
Altered form of French   Tricot   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. It was reportedly brought to North America from England. Today it is found mainly in PA and OH. Compare   Trago  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Trago
meanings: Variant of   Trego  , a surname of Cornish and French origin. In the US, it is found mainly in PA and OH.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey De Tregoz was born about 1215, in Billingford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Tregoz I, was 48 and his mother, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, was 38. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died about 1255, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey De Tregoz est né environ 1215, à Billingford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Tregoz I, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Sibyl d’Ewyas Lady of Burneham, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1255, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey De Tregoz um 1215 in Billingford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Tregoz I 48 und seine Mutter Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham 38. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1255 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey De Tregoz è nato il circa 1215 nel Billingford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Tregoz I, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1255, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey De Tregozが約1215年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクビリングフォードで生まれた時，父Robert de Tregoz Iは48歳，母Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burnehamは38歳であった。彼は少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1255年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey De Tregoz(이)가 대략 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 빌링퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Tregoz I(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham(은)는 38세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1255년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey De Tregoz nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Billingford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Tregoz I, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1255, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey De Tregoz родился около 1215 г. в местности биллингфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Tregoz I было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham, 38. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1255 г. в возрасте 42 лет.
